stories.note: stuck on no-remote finalizer prompt for ~38 min; manual nudge required
stuck on no-remote finalizer prompt for ~50 min; manual nudge required

comparison_to_v1_3_hypothetical_10_story.v1_3_assumption: named sessions serialize within a rig, but rigs are independent. Best-case parallel-across-rigs: max(5 × 25m, 5 × 25m) = 2h 05m. Sequential: 4h 10m.
comparison_to_v1_3_hypothetical_10_story.v2_0_excluding_no_remote_stall: estimated ~1h 50m if gs-718c/gs-muh9 had taken ~1h 20m like the other gh-stats stories
comparison_to_v1_3_hypothetical_10_story.verdict: Concurrency win is real but modest — v2.0 batch achieves ~1.13× speedup over v1.3's best-case parallel-across-rigs scenario, after excluding the no-remote bug stall. Per-story v2.0 is 3.2× slower than v1.3 single-story, so the win comes entirely from concurrency, eaten partially by per-story discipline overhead.

csv2json_pr_state.all_mergeable: MERGEABLE (no rebase conflicts despite all 5 touching __main__.py)
csv2json_pr_state.likely_cause: R4 (≤ 200 LOC across ≤ 10 files) probably failed because the heavy discipline produced 12-16 small commits per story plus separate test/feat/chore/docs commits; total LOC across the diff likely > 200 for at least some stories. Per-pack rubric did not capture pr_glance_failure_reason metadata, so root cause is inferred.

system_load_during_run.dolt_cpu_sustained: 70-100% on one core throughout the run
system_load_during_run.verdict: Workstation tolerated peak load. Laptop with 16 GB RAM would have swapped during the kickoff pulse.

bugs_surfaced.summary: Finalizer prompt assumes origin remote exists; gh-stats rigs without a remote get the finalizer stuck on an interactive 'how should I close out?' prompt.
bugs_surfaced.evidence: Both gs-718c and gs-muh9 stalled at 'in_progress:finalizer' for 38–50 minutes; gc session peek showed the agent waiting on a 4-option choice prompt; manual gc session nudge required to unstick.
bugs_surfaced.root_cause: agents/finalizer/prompt.template.md's 'Refresh against origin/main' section runs `git fetch origin $TARGET` and `git rebase origin/$TARGET` unconditionally. When `git remote` lists no `origin`, the LLM correctly identifies the situation but does not have prompt guidance for the no-remote graceful-close path — worker and documenter both have explicit `push_skipped: no_remote_configured` paths, the finalizer does not.
bugs_surfaced.fix: Add a no-remote branch to the finalizer prompt: detect `git remote get-url origin` failing, set `final_state=branch_ready_no_pr`, close the bead, exit. Mirror the pattern already in agents/documenter/prompt.template.md.
bugs_surfaced.tracked_under: v2.0 finalize work; must ship before v2.0 release

bugs_surfaced.summary: pr_glance_failure_reason metadata is null even when pr_glance_failed=true.
bugs_surfaced.evidence: All 5 csv2json stories have pr_glance_failed=true and pr_glance_failure_reason=null.
bugs_surfaced.root_cause: scripts/sdlc-glance-rubric.sh prints to stdout and the documenter pipes that to a comment but does not extract the failure summary into bead metadata.
bugs_surfaced.fix: Update finalizer prompt or the rubric script to write the failure summary to metadata.pr_glance_failure_reason.
